data.error_reporting: Enable anonymous crash reporting (helps improve the integration)

wifi_discover.title: Discover Jura WiFi Machines
wifi_discover.description: Scanning for Jura machines on the network. Select a discovered machine or choose to enter an IP address manually.

wifi_auth.title: Pairing with Jura Machine
wifi_auth.description: If your machine requires a PIN, it will be displayed on the machine's screen. Enter it below. If no PIN is needed, leave it empty and submit.

abort.already_configured: This Jura machine is already configured.
abort.not_jura: The discovered device is not a Jura coffee machine.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Jura machine. Check that it is powered on and connected to WiFi.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the machine.
error.wrong_pin: Incorrect PIN. Check the PIN displayed on your machine.
error.wrong_hash: Authentication rejected. Try removing the device from J.O.E. and re-pairing.
